subcodes.first_line: O ye divine loved ones! His Holiness Furúghí—upon him be the Glory of the All-Glorious—telleth of the radiant effulgence in that land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی حضرت فروغی علیه بهاء الله الابهی از فروغ انوار در آن دیار حکایت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @entry by troops, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
